non_negotiable_rules: Rule 1 — Data Source Badge: Every data display must show [SOURCE_NAME · YEAR · LIVE|CACHED|MOCK], visible without hovering
Rule 2 — Three-Tier Fallback: LIVE → CACHED (Supabase api_cache) → MOCK (public/mock/*.geojson). Never blank map or error-only
Rule 3 — No API Keys in Source Code: Credentials in .env only
Rule 4 — RLS + Application Layer Isolation: RLS on every table + app-layer tenant_id verification. Both required
Rule 5 — POPIA Annotation: Files touching personal data must include POPIA annotation block
Rule 6 — CartoDB Attribution: Map must display © CARTO | © OpenStreetMap contributors
Rule 7 — File Size Limit: Source files ≤ 300 lines. Planning docs and migrations exempt
Rule 8 — No Lightstone Data: GV Roll 2022 is approved valuation source only
Rule 9 — Geographic Scope: Bounding box { west: 18.0, south: -34.5, east: 19.5, north: -33.0 }. Cape Town + Western Cape only
Rule 10 — Milestone Sequencing: Sequential M0–M15. No skipping. Human confirms each DoD

frontend.mapping: MapLibre GL JS (NOT Leaflet, NOT Mapbox GL JS)

geographic_constraints.scope: City of Cape Town + Western Cape Province ONLY

existing_capabilities: GV Roll 2022 valuation data pipeline (planned M6)
13 Claude Code sub-agents (map, auth, db, tile, spatial, overlay, search, details, save, export, dashboard, data, test)
9 Claude Code skills (mock-to-live, documentation-first, assumption-verification, data-source-badge, rls-audit, spatial-validation, three-tier-fallback, popia-compliance, tile-optimization)
12 GitHub Copilot agents mirroring Claude agents
5 Copilot instruction sets (supabase, nextjs, maplibre, popia-security, typescript)

missing_capabilities.description: No 3D globe or photorealistic tile rendering. Current stack is 2D MapLibre only
No 4DGS pipeline for temporal 3D reconstruction. No docs/architecture/4d-gaussian-splatting.md found
No Neural Radiance Field or 3D Gaussian Splatting reconstruction. No docs/architecture/nerf-3dgs-integration.md found
No Shapefile or File Geodatabase upload/import pipeline. Research exists (docs/research/04b_ArcGIS_Web_Integration.md) but no implementation
No QGIS project file upload or rendering support
No spatialintelligence.ai integration or documentation. docs/inspirations/ directory does not exist
No AI-guided 3D scene editing via ControlNet or GaussCtrl pipelines
No Python microservice layer. Backend is Next.js API routes + Supabase only. requirements-experiments.txt and train_sample.py exist at root but are not integrated

spatial_constraints_notes: Project is strictly 2D web mapping (MapLibre GL JS) with PostGIS backend. All 3D capabilities (CesiumJS, NeRF, 3DGS, 4DGS) are absent. Geographic scope is locked to Cape Town/Western Cape bounding box. CRS is dual: EPSG:4326 for storage, EPSG:3857 for rendering. Max 10,000 GeoJSON features per client layer before switching to Martin MVT. Cadastral parcels only at zoom ≥ 14. No Python ML/AI pipeline infrastructure exists — only a standalone train_sample.py experiment file. Adding any of the missing capabilities would require PLAN_DEVIATIONS.md documentation and human approval per CLAUDE.md Rule 10 and escalation protocol.
